name: Social Places
description:
What Social Places Does

Social Places is social media management software and white-labeled marketing technology for agencies and resellers. It features a centralized platform for managing social media reviews and live customer feedback. The software also offers robust statistics, reports, and in-store customer feedback tools.

The white label features give you a branded domain, emails, and dashboard with your brand. Unlike most other platforms on our list, Social Places does not have extensive white-label capabilities. 

Source: Social Places

Key Features

Social Places features white-labeled tools and additional solutions:

  1. White Label Features
  • Brandable dashboards
  • Customized domain with your brand 
  • White-label branded emails
  1. Additional Features: 
  • Listings management for platforms across the web
  • Centralized social media management: Manage social media reviews and live customer feedback from a single platform with real-time notifications 
  • Comprehensive statistics: Reports and comparison table for monitoring post performance by location.
  • In-store customer feedback tool with support for mobile devices.

Benefits of Social Places

The Social Places platform provides the following benefits:  

  • Users can access white-label benefits like a branded dashboard, white-label e-mails, and white-label domains for a branded interface with their clients. 
  • Listings management for social media and GPS mapping platforms. Set up and audit listings to ensure correctness across different platforms 
  • Utilize branded mobile sites to collect customer feedback 
  • Gain enhanced insights from robust statistics and reports 

Pricing

There are four payment plans: 

  • Standard: USD 169 /location/month
  • Growth: USD 225 /location/month
  • Premium: USD 281 /location/month  
  • Custom: Customized pricing

Pros

✅White label features

✅Listings management 

✅Instant notifications  

Cons

🚫Limited white label features

🚫Integration issues
